task_description: Deepen an existing content pillar (AI-tools workflow content, per task-0001/pdca/wiring-check-0001) with real, sourced fact sheets for AI meeting-notes/summarization tools already referenced in prior (unsourced, since-flagged) drafts: Otter.ai, Fireflies.ai, Fathom, and Notion AI's page-summarize feature. For each: current price, free-tier limit (minutes/month, storage cap, or usage cap as applicable), verified_as_of date (today), and the primary source URL (official pricing page). Flag any conflicting or stale info explicitly. This directly re-grounds content that previously stated invented figures for these exact products.
next_action: Review the handoff and, if approved, continue through the existing execution flow.
